atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling fine most of the days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he can tell when his blood pressure is high.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports headaches when his blood pressure gets really high.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling high blood pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's blood pressure was as high as 170 over 90.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribed cardura 4 milligrams once a day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: doctor
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants the patient to decrease their alcohol intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: doctor
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants the patient to decrease their salt intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: doctor
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants the patient to stop taking any nonsteroidal medicines such as advil or motrin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: doctor
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants the patient to keep a record of their blood pressures for their next visit.
